/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmpdlisten.so -o libmpdlisten.so CMakeFiles/mpdlisten.dir/mpdlisten_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpdlisten.dir/mpdlisten_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpdlisten.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_com_pioki_jukebox_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpdlisten.dir/mpdListen.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN" /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
